rationale: Surface shape: CWE-787 unbounded memcpy into a fixed 128B stack buffer. Gated by `capable(CAP_DAC_OVERRIDE)`. DAC bypass = root-equivalent file access in practice. Axis-4 (capability_check) detects the cap call site. Constant `CAP_DAC_OVERRIDE` IS in _PRIVILEGED_CAP_CONSTANTS → verdict policy emits NOT_EXPLOITABLE.
